# Deep Agents in 2026: The Future Isn't Better Models. It's Better Architecture.

Most AI agents don't fail because the model is weak.

tweets.name: satyam kumar

tweets.text:
Prompt Caching Is the Highest-ROI LLM Optimization Most Teams Still Ignore (2026)

Everyone is chasing smaller models, better prompts, and cheaper GPUs.

Meanwhile, their agents keep paying full price for the exact same instructions on every request.

That isn't an AI problem.
